scripts.prestart: CI=true pnpm install && composer install --working-dir=plugins/wpappointments && pnpm run build
scripts.start: pnpm run start:wp && pnpm run start:mailhog
scripts.stop: pnpm run stop:wp && pnpm run stop:mailhog
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:js && pnpm run lint:php
scripts.format: pnpm run format:js && npm run format:php
scripts.phpcs: bash -c 'if [ -f vendor/bin/phpcs ]; then ./vendor/bin/phpcs --standard=.phpcs.xml "$@"; elif docker info > /dev/null 2>&1; then wp-env run cli --env-cwd=wp-content ./vendor/bin/phpcs "$@"; else phpcs --standard=.phpcs.xml "$@"; fi' --
scripts.phpcbf: bash -c 'if [ -f vendor/bin/phpcbf ]; then ./vendor/bin/phpcbf --standard=.phpcs.xml "$@"; s=$?; [ $s -eq 1 ] && exit 0 || exit $s; elif docker info > /dev/null 2>&1; then wp-env run cli --env-cwd=wp-content bash ./.husky/phpcbf "$@"; else phpcbf --standard=.phpcs.xml "$@"; fi' --
scripts.dump-autoload: wp-env run cli --env-cwd=wp-content composer dump-autoload && wp-env run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/wpappointments composer dump-autoload
